title: What It Actually Looks Like to Want a Wife and Not Need One
caption:
Wanting and needing look the same from the outside. They aren't.

A hole pulls anyone in to fill it. Desperation has a smell, and she can pick it up before you say a word. Want doesn't grab at what's near. It waits with open hands for what's right.

If she's supposed to complete what only God fills, you'll drain her trying. Seek first the kingdom, and everything else, including her, finds its right size instead of an impossible one.

A man chasing God is already building something worth joining: a disciplined week, a clean conscience, a life with actual weight to it. She's not the missing piece. She's the woman who gets to walk into something already standing.

The wanting doesn't go away. It just stops being the one driving.

What would your life look like this year if it wasn't waiting on her to start? Save this for the season you're actually in.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #relationships #christianity #singleness
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
